decks.notes: This Boros Aggro deck aims to aggressively control the board using efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and static effects like Static Prison. It utilizes powerful creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls to deal consistent damage while Thalia, Guardian of Thraben disrupts opponent's spells. The deck also features utility lands like Karakas and Wasteland to help maintain board advantage. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional threats and tools for closing out games quickly. Overall, this deck focuses on quick, aggressive plays to overwhelm opponents and secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly set up a powerful combo by using cards like Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience to put huge threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Griselbrand into play. The deck also includes ways to protect the combo with cards like Force of Will and Flusterstorm. Additionally, cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Lotus Petal help to find and play the necessary pieces quickly, while lands like Ancient Tomb and City of Traitors provide accelerated mana to get the combo online as soon as possible.

The deck focuses on a powerful win condition using the Doomsday card to manipulate the player's library and set up a winning combination of cards, with Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent providing card advantage and disruption. The deck includes a variety of cantrips and counterspells to help find and protect the combo pieces, while also utilizing mana acceleration like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal. The goal is to set up a win condition quickly and efficiently while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a lock down on the opponent, preventing them from playing spells effectively. By ramping up with cards like Grim Monolith and Trinisphere, the deck aims to quickly establish control of the game. Key cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator are used to provide removal and disruption, while also utilizing Urza's Saga to generate more artifacts. The goal is to slow down the opponent's game plan through artifact prison effects and eventually win the game through powerful cards like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly amass artifacts and use them to generate mana and card advantage. The deck utilizes cards like Ancient Tomb and Seat of the Synod to quickly ramp into threats like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Thought Monitor. Urza's Saga is a key piece of the strategy, enabling the player to tutor for powerful artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Pithing Needle. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor to control the game and maintain pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful artifacts to generate mana and disrupt opponents while quickly ramping up to play high-cost threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. It also utilizes combo pieces like Paradox Engine and Coveted Jewel to create explosive turns. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive artifact creatures, powerful sorceries, and resource denial through cards like Trinisphere. The key strategy is to quickly establish a board presence and control the game through efficient mana generation and disruptive artifacts.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro Legacy deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls, while controlling the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment can provide additional reach for closing out the game. The mana base includes fetch lands like Arid Mesa and Marsh Flats to ensure smooth mana fixing, while also utilizing dual lands like Scrubland and Plateau for color consistency.

This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and removal spells to quickly and aggressively control the battlefield. It emphasizes disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push while also developing its own board presence with creatures like Barrowgoyf and Nethergoyf. The deck also includes cards like Dark Ritual and Wasteland to ramp up mana production and disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with cards like Stitcher's Supplier and Once Upon a Time to bring out powerful creatures like Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis early in the game. The deck also uses cards like Wight of the Reliquary and Elvish Reclaimer to search for key lands like Bojuka Bog and Underground Mortuary. The combination of graveyard recursion, land tutoring, and disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push creates a fast and resilient combo strategy that can overwhelm opponents in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing the combo of Show and Tell along with Sneak Attack to cheat in powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield for free. The deck includes cards like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Stock Up to dig for combo pieces and protection like Force of Will and Daze. With the ability to play big threats quickly and disrupt opponents with counter magic, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and quickly close out the game.

Utilizing disruptive spells and efficient creatures, this deck aims to control the game through tempo plays while applying pressure on the opponent's life total. The key strategy involves using cards like Thoughtseize and Daze to disrupt the opponent's game plan while deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters to quickly close out the game. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to further cement its aggressive game plan. With a mix of disruption and aggression, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the combo of Painter's Servant and Grindstone to mill your opponent's entire library in one turn. Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble help to set up the combo quickly, while Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Lotus Petal provide additional card advantage and mana acceleration. Force of Will and Metallic Rebuke offer protection against opposing spells, while Sink into Stupor disrupts the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently and rapidly to achieve a quick victory.

The deck revolves around efficiently assembling combo pieces, particularly the card Doomsday, to create a winning game state. It uses cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Thassa?s Oracle to set up the combo, while also including disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will for protection. The deck aims to carefully plan out and execute a sequence of plays using cards like Brainstorm and Personal Tutor to ensure a successful combo finish. It also includes various mana acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to help speed up the process.

This deck focuses on leveraging disruptive spells like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to control the opponent's resources while efficiently deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm to ensure consistency and card advantage. With a mix of disruption, tempo plays, and powerful threats, this Dimir Tempo deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while efficiently closing out the game.

This deck is centered around utilizing cheap and efficient spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. By playing cards like Delver of Secrets, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent alongside counter spells like Daze and Force of Will, the deck aims to establish an aggressive presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base and maintain tempo advantage. Overall, the deck seeks to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game.

This combo deck focuses on generating a high storm count to cast Tendrils of Agony for lethal damage. The deck utilizes cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond to generate mana quickly, while also using cards like Gamble and Burning Wish to tutor for key combo pieces. Silence and Echo of Eons help to protect the combo by disrupting opponent's responses. The deck also includes cards like Brainstorm and Beseech the Mirror for card selection and additional resources to fuel the storm count.
